name: cs321-calendar-project
description: Our team will develop a Smart Integrated Calendar application that combines scheduling, real-time weather updates, customizable themes, reminders, and holiday tracking into one platform. The system allows users to view their daily, weekly, and monthly schedules alongside relevant weather forecasts, helping them plan activities more effectively.Users can set reminders for events, deadlines, and tasks, customize the calendar’s appearance with themes, and automatically view local and national holidays.
